tweets.text:
Five major models hit OpenRouter in ten days. That's not a coincidence — it's a market signal.

From May 27 to June 4: Claude Opus 4.8, Step 3.7 Flash, MiniMax M3, Qwen3.7-Plus, and NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra. Every tier of the price ladder now has a credible 1M-context option.

The
tweets.name: Teksart

tweets.text:
Career-Ops — an AI-powered job search system built entirely on Claude Code.

14 skill modes, a Go dashboard, PDF generation, and batch processing. It automates the entire job hunt pipeline: resume tailoring, cover letter generation, job matching, application tracking, and
tweets.name: Teksart

tweets.text:
Ponytail — the AI agent plugin that makes your LLM think like the laziest senior dev.

Built by Dietrich Gebert, this is a Claude Code plugin that enforces YAGNI at the agent level. Before writing any code, it forces the model to answer: "Do you actually need this right now?"
tweets.name: Teksart

tweets.text:
RTK — the CLI proxy that cuts LLM token consumption by 60-90%.

Built in Rust as a single binary with zero dependencies. It sits between you and the LLM, intercepting common dev commands and optimizing them before they hit the API.

How it works:
- Caches repeated responses
tweets.name: Teksart

tweets.text:
Google's Gemini 3.5 Flash is now GA and it inverts the usual Pro-over-Flash hierarchy.

At $1.50/$9.00 per million tokens, it beats Gemini 3.1 Pro on coding and agentic benchmarks at roughly 4x the speed. That's not a typo — the Flash tier is outperforming the previous Pro tier https://t.co/8RNzhDhrPN
tweets.name: Teksart

tweets.text:
The June 2026 model leaderboard is out — and the top tier tells a clear story.

Claude Opus 4.8 holds #1 on the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index at 61.4 — the first model to break 60. SWE-Bench Verified 88.6%, Terminal-Bench 74.6%, USAMO 2026 at 96.7%. But at $25/M output https://t.co/2DcinB1vPG
tweets.name: Teksart

tweets.text:
JetBrains just released Mellum2 — a 12B MoE model for software development, and it's Apache 2.0.

Architecture: 12B total, 2.5B active (8 of 64 experts). 131K context. LiveCodeBench v6 score of 69.9 — near Qwen3-14B coding quality at a fraction of the active params.

What makes https://t.co/Cs1jCwn03A
tweets.name: Teksart

tweets.text:
Ideogram 4 just shipped its first-ever open weights — a 9.3B Diffusion Transformer trained from scratch.

This is the biggest open-weight image model release of 2026 so far. Architecture: flow-matching DiT with native 2K output resolution. Structured prompts support JSON with https://t.co/AjEVEFIriH
tweets.name: Teksart

tweets.text:
NVIDIA just dropped a 550B hybrid Mamba-MoE model — and it's openly weighted.

Nemotron 3 Ultra: 55B active params, 1M context, 89.1 MMLU. The architecture is a Mamba–Transformer hybrid with sparse MoE routing. Only ~10% of params activate per token.

Why this matters: This is https://t.co/xSYhAYjFne
tweets.name: Teksart

tweets.text:
The agent harness market is splitting into two distinct camps — and the gap is widening fast.

Camp 1: "The Model is the Agent" — Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Windsurf. These are vertically integrated: the model and the environment are one product. You get a polished UX, but
tweets.name: Teksart
